LanguageData.Hormones.label: Hormones
LanguageData.Hormones.description: The current hormones level of the pawn. High hormones means the pawn stays calm in battle, while low hormones causes fear and panic.
LanguageData.MuscleStrain.label: 肌肉劳损
LanguageData.MuscleStrain.description: 肌肉疲劳和劳损程度。劳损越高越容易受伤，仅在睡觉时恢复。
